---
pagetitle: "Shih-Yang Lin 林世揚"
description: "Assistant Professor of Economics, National Dong Hwa University"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Assistant Professor · Economics
:::

# Shih-Yang Lin [林世揚]{.cjk}

::: {.affil}
Department of Economics, National Dong Hwa University
:::

::: {.intro}
I am an Assistant Professor in the Department of Economics at National Dong Hwa
University. My research focuses on macroeconomics and econometrics — spanning
financial frictions, inflation inequality, and the econometrics of policy
evaluation.
:::

::: {.contact}
[✉ Email](mailto:linsy@gms.ndhu.edu.tw){.pill}
[◎ ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0864-0187){.pill}
[↧ CV](cv.qmd){.pill}
:::

## Education

:::: {.entry}
[2025]{.year}

::: {}
[Ph.D. in Economics]{.role}<br>[National Taiwan University]{.org}
:::
::::

:::: {.entry}
[2016]{.year}

::: {}
[M.A. in Economics]{.role}<br>[National Taiwan University]{.org}
:::
::::

:::: {.entry}
[2008]{.year}

::: {}
[B.A. in Political Economy]{.role}<br>[National Sun Yat-Sen University]{.org}
:::
::::

## Research Interests

::: {.tags}
[Macroeconomics]{.tag}
[Financial Economics]{.tag}
[Econometrics]{.tag}
[Labor Economics]{.tag}
:::

::: {.section-row}
## Selected Publications
[All research →](research.qmd){.more}
:::

:::: {.pub}
[U.S. Inflation Inequality between 2010 and 2023]{.title}

::: {.meta}
with YiLi Chien and Yi-Chan Tsai · *Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis Review*, 2026
:::
::::

:::: {.pub}
[Financial Frictions and Uncertainty Shocks]{.title}

::: {.meta}
with Yi-Chan Tsai and Po-Yuan Wang · *Macroeconomic Dynamics*, 2025
:::
::::

:::: {.pub}
[Estimating the Willingness to Pay for Voting when Absentee Voting is not Allowed]{.title}

::: {.meta}
with C.Y. Cyrus Chu and Wen-Jen Tsay · *Social Science Quarterly*, 2021
:::
::::
